creator: Ultima1252@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 161350
patchfile of port

This patch will update x11/nvidia-driver to the most current version, 355.11 and will no longer cause leftover files on removal.

I have tested this patch with poudriere building nvidia-driver, nvidia-driver-304, and nvidia-driver-340 on 102amd64, 102i386, 93amd64, and 93i386 with all options on, all options off, and the defaults. All built perfectly with no reported errors from poudriere. For sake of sanity, I will only post the poudriere logs with defaults. I am also currently running it on 10-STABLE-amd64 and is working perfectly as far as I can tell.

Each poudriere *.log will have the three ports appended.
